changes: Share projects with a single short link, complete with a QR code and a 30-day history of your links
Open a shared link to preview the project and either import your own copy or browse it read-only
Language flags on the setup and shared pages, cycling through countries for languages spoken in several regions
Editor keyboard shortcuts: play/pause, seek, jump between lines, and quick-edit the current line
New Share and Export buttons in the editor, with smoother floating actions and instant sync when you scrub the audio
Project status workflow: mark projects Not Started, In Progress, In Review, or Completed
Filter the projects page by status, including archived projects
Archive and unarchive projects to keep your list tidy
Back up and restore your whole library to a file
3D parallax tilt on cover art for a more expressive feel
Project search now ignores accents, so "Alone" matches "Alonø"
Audio player with waveform progress bar, URL/local file support, and LRC sync
Undo/redo for editor changes with snapshot history (max 10 steps)
YAML project export and import (full project backup/restore)
Redesigned export dialog with format and content dropdowns
All Projects page with client-side search and 5-column responsive grid
Project card: export option added to context menu
Auto-calculate progress and status on project creation
Improved scrollbar styling with visible track
Material 3 Expressive loading indicator with 7 morphing shapes
AI provider selection for auto translation (Draft intention)
Worker proxy correctly returns Odesli streaming links
Search: 'no results' feedback and larger loading indicator
Initial release
Lyric editor with timestamp controls
LRC and SRT export
Multi-language interface (EN, ES, PT)
MusicBrainz, Deezer, and Odesli metadata integration
